prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约481名→434名→752名→540名→349名，整体波动较大，2025年位次大幅前移至349名，创近五年最佳，显示报考热度显 著回升；2021年理科计划49人，2022年50人，2023年82人，2024年物理类51人，2025年物理类52人；2026年物理类计划61人，较2025年扩招约17.3%，扩 招幅度较大，对竞争有缓解作用，位次预计后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第5名，稳居全国顶尖梯队，对高分考生吸引力 持续强劲；2026年声誉评价偏负面（师德师风相关事件），但抖音综合热度排名第4（高热），短视频曝光量极大，整体报考关注度仍处高位；2025年声誉偏正 面（科研成果荣誉），未见投档断档记录；复旦大学拥有A+学科12个（数学、物理学、哲学、中国语言文学、新闻传播学、理论经济学、政治学、马克思主义理 论、生物学、公共卫生与预防医学等），A-及以上学科共27个，学科实力覆盖理科招生专业中的数学类、物理学类、工科试验班、经济管理试验班等方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理工科专业持续高热推荐，与复旦大学工科试验班（计算与智能、集成电路、未来信息等方向）高度契合；安徽省2026年高考总人数451 000人，较2025年（约462179人）减少约2.4%，物理类考生估算约313500人，同比略降，竞争压力小幅缓解；复旦大学位于上海 ，对安徽考生有较强跨省吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势走势、2026年扩招约17.3%的缓解效应、考生总 数小幅下降以及学校高热度的持续吸引，预计2026年理科最低位次约380名，区间353–407名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 481 → 434 → 752 → 540 → 349, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2025, the ranking moved sharply forward to 349, the best in five years, indicating a notable recovery in application popularity. The science enrollment plan was 49 in 2021, 50 in 2022, 82 in 2023, 51 in 2024 (physics category), and 52 in 2025 (physics category). In 2026, the physics category plan is 61, an increase of about 17.3% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that may alleviate competition and is expected to push the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 5th, firmly in the top tier of the country, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (incidents related to teacher ethics), but the overall Douyin popularity ranking is 4th (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, keeping overall application attention at a high level. In 2025, the reputation was somewhat positive (research achievements and honors), with no records of enrollment gaps. Fudan University has 12 A+ disciplines (Mathematics, Physics, Philosophy, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Theoretical Economics, Political Science, Marxist Theory, Biology, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, etc.) and a total of 27 disciplines rated A- or above. Its academic strength covers directions such as Mathematics, Physics, Engineering Experimental Class, and Economics and Management Experimental Class in the science enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other science and engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, closely aligning with Fudan University's engineering experimental classes (such as Computing and Intelligence, Integrated Circuits, Future Information, etc.). In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Gaokao in Anhui Province is 451,000, a decrease of about 2.4% from 2025 (approximately 462,179). The estimated number of physics category candidates is about 313,500, a slight year-on-year decrease, slightly easing competition pressure. Fudan University is located in Shanghai, which has strong cross-provincial appeal to Anhui candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend of the 2025 ranking, the mitigating effect of the approximately 17.3% enrollment expansion in 2026, the slight decrease in the total number of candidates, and the sustained high popularity of the school, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will be about 380, with a range of 353–407.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuit Leading Talent Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 380, with a range of 353–407. It is recommended that candidates within this ranking range primarily apply for Tier 2 majors (Mathematics Class, Computing and Intelligence Leading Talent Class, Mathematical Economics Top-Notch Class), use Tier 1 majors (Xianghui Academy Shannon/Xianghui Plan, Integrated Circuit Leading Talent Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Computing and Intelligence Innovation College, Management Science and Business Intelligence Experimental Class, etc.) as a safe backup. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 353) can focus on sprinting for top Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 75th → 74th → 276th → 108th → 80th, with a notable drop in 2023 (276th), followed by a rapid recovery in 2024–2025, returning to 80th in 2025, showing a high-level fluctuating pattern; from 2021 to 2024, the liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 18 students each year, in 2025 it was 17, and in 2026 it remains 17, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 5th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly in the top tier nationally, with particularly outstanding strength in liberal arts; in 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (related to teacher ethics incidents), but its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 4th (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, maintaining high overall application attention; in 2025, its reputation was relatively positive (scientific research achievements and honors), with no records of enrollment gaps; Fudan University has a dense concentration of advantageous liberal arts disciplines: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Philosophy A+, Chinese History A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Political Science A+, Marxist Theory A+, Law A-, Sociology A, Foreign Language and Literature A-, covering all history category enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is recommended as hot, Chinese Language/Chinese major is recommended, Economics category is divided and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; in 2026, the total number of Anhui Province Gaokao examinees is 451,000, with history category examinees estimated at about 137,500, a decrease of about 2.8% from 2025 (141,400), slightly easing competition pressure; Fudan University is located in Shanghai, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Anhui liberal arts examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking has rebounded to a high of 80th, the enrollment plan remains unchanged, the total number of examinees has slightly decreased, and the university's top-tier liberal arts reputation continues to attract, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will be approximately 83rd, with a range of 73rd to 93rd.

- Economics Category (including Mathematical Economics direction, Finance, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 83rd, with a range of 73rd to 93rd. It is recommended that examinees within this range primarily apply for Tier 2 majors (Social Science Experimental Class, Chinese Language and Literature Category) as the main choice, Tier 1 majors (Law, Economics Category) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Journalism and Communication Category, English) as a safe backup. Examinees with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 73rd) can focus on reaching for the flagship majors of Law and Economics Category.
